titleStmt.title: SII 41.47: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 47. (A.R. No. 46 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Mukhyachalaesvara temple on the hill.

summary.p: Gift of 32 cows for a lamp by a temple woman (dēvaraḍiyāḷ) Sivan-pākaṅkoṇḍāḷ alias Vīrapattiranaṅgai to the temple at Perumukkil alias Edirilichōḻa-nallūr in Ōymā-nāḍu. The donor was the daughter of Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-māṇikkam and grand daughter of Āṇḍakai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nāmaruviyakalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulkaarumaṟai nanneṟiyaṉaittun taḻaippa varumuṟaimayil maṇimuṭicūṭit tiṅkaḷveṇkuṭait ticaikaḷi
ṟeṭṭuntaṅkutani kūṭantāneṉa viḷaṅkak karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkol tuṟappa porukatirāḻi pulivaḷantuṭantu miṉavarp pallavar mutaliyapāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅkaṟpum maṇmicainaṭātti Eṇṇaruṅkaṟpum
maṇṇakam piṟantu cempon virasimhāsaṉattup puvanamuḻutumuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāna tipuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
Oymānāṭāṉa vicairājentravaḷanāṭṭup perumukkalāṉa Etirilicoḻanallūr Uṭaiyār tirumalaimel Āḷuṭaiyanāyaṉār tiruvānmiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku Ikkoyil tevaraṭiyāḷ Āṇṭakai makaḷ kulottuṅkacoḻa māṇikkattin makaḷ
civanpākaṅkoṇṭāḷāṉa virapattiranaṅkai Innāyaṉāṟku vaitta tirununtā viḷakku Onṟu Onṟukkun nāṉviṭṭa pacu 3 10 2 Iṣapam Onṟu Ivaḷ virapattiranaṅkai vaitta tirununtā viḷakkāṟ pacuk kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai celuttakka
ṭavomānom Ikkoyil kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Itu santirātittavarai panmāheśvararakṣai§
Digital edition of SII 41.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
